commands.repair_reason: - [P2] A narrow repair can be attempted on the PR branch by forwarding the same node env into prepare coverage and adding one regression for env-sensitive marker reuse.; Needs attention: The diff narrows the original gateway-PATH problem, but the new prepare coverage path can create an approval skip when coverage and execution use different env inputs.; Review finding: [P1] Build prepare coverage from the forwarded... commands.review_summary:
The PR changes node-host exec approval prechecks to use the node-forwarded environment, adds node allow-always coverage/marker metadata, and expands regression tests.

PR surface: Source +261, Tests +799. Total +1060 across 9 files.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection shows current main analyzes node approval with gateway env while `system.run` forwards target env, and the PR-introduced marker path is source-reproducible because prepare coverage ignores forwarded env while execution uses it; I did not run a live paired-node scenario in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] A narrow repair can be attempted on the PR branch by forwarding the same node env into prepare coverage and adding one regression for env-sensitive marker reuse.
